emails.subject: Rabi De's sign on bonus
emails.body: Rabi De's sign on bonus John, We are trying to hire Rabi De, whose sign-on bonus proposal was sent to you for approval, for RAC. He will support vale-at-risk applications, the area where we are hopelessly understaffed. Vince

emails.subject: Re: Rabi De's sign on bonus
emails.body: Re: Rabi De's sign on bonus Sorry Vince I have been out of town. Please give me a call tomorrow.
